seo_data.generated_keywords: Ariete 6234, Steam Iron, 2000W Iron, Non-stick Iron, Auto-clean Iron, Ergonomic Steam Iron, Vertical Steam, Dry Ironing, Everyday Iron, Teflon Soleplate
seo_data.meta_description: Discover the Ariete 6234 Steam Iron, designed for easy, efficient everyday ironing. Features 2000W power, non-stick Teflon plate, auto-clean, and vertical steam.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The Ariete Steam Iron 6234 is engineered for exceptional ease of use and efficient ironing, making it ideal for daily garment care. Boasting a powerful 2000W output and a non-stick Teflon plate measuring 21.5x11.5 cm, it ensures smooth gliding and effective wrinkle removal. Its lightweight, reduced size, and ergonomic soft-touch handle contribute to a comfortable ironing experience, complemented by convenient horizontal filling for the 250ml water tank.

This model delivers consistent performance with a steam emission of 28gr/min and a powerful steam shot of 140gr/min, alongside vertical steam capability for hanging garments. The integrated auto-clean function simplifies maintenance, while the dry/steam and steam adjustment features offer versatility for different fabric types. An intense blue finish and included 50 ml measuring cup complete this brilliantly designed appliance, offering practical functionality and a compact form factor.

range_overview:
The Ariete Steam Iron 6234 is meticulously designed for a user-friendly and highly efficient ironing experience, perfect for everyday household use. This model integrates a robust 2000W heating element with a durable non-stick Teflon soleplate, precisely sized at 21.5x11.5 cm, ensuring effortless glides across various fabrics and consistent heat distribution for effective wrinkle removal. Its compact design and lightweight structure, combined with an ergonomic soft-touch handle, enhance comfort and maneuverability during extended ironing sessions, featuring a practical horizontal filling mechanism for its 250ml water tank.

Beyond its ergonomic advantages, the 6234 delivers powerful steam performance with a continuous steam emission of 28gr/min and an impressive 140gr/min steam shot for tackling stubborn creases. The appliance offers versatile ironing options, including both dry and steam functions, adjustable steam settings, a spray function for dampening fabrics, and a vertical steam capability, allowing for convenient refreshing of hanging garments. Maintenance is simplified with an integrated auto-clean system, ensuring long-term performance and efficiency. Presented in an intense blue finish, the Ariete 6234 also includes a 50 ml measuring cup, making it a comprehensive solution for efficient and brilliant garment care.
sales_arguments: Powerful 2000W for quick heating and efficient performance.
Non-stick Teflon soleplate (21.5x11.5 cm) for smooth gliding and effective wrinkle removal.
Lightweight and compact design with an ergonomic soft-touch handle for comfortable, easy everyday use.
Versatile steam functions, including 140gr/min steam shot, 28gr/min continuous steam, vertical steam, and a spray function.
Auto-clean system ensures easy maintenance and extends product lifespan.

technical_specifications.Functions: Dry / Steam, Vertical Steam, Steam Adjustment, Auto-clean, Spray Function
